name: ICU MEDICAL INC/DE
business: ICU develops, manufactures and sells innovative medical products used in infusion therapy, vascular access, and vital care applications. Its primary customers are acute care hospitals, wholesalers, ambulatory clinics and alternate site facilities. The product portfolio includes consumables, infusion systems, and vital care products.

exposures.sentence: ICU develops, manufactures and sells innovative medical products used in infusion therapy, vascular access, and vital care applications.
LifeShield infusion safety software for Plum infusion pumps (Plum Solo, Plum Duo) is an enterprise-wide platform designed with the input of pharmacists, nurses and administrators.

Plum 360 has been named Best in KLAS for eight years in a row (2018, 2019, 2020, 2023 Best in KLAS Smart Pump Traditional; 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025 Best in KLAS Smart Pump EMR Integrated) and was the first medical device to be awarded UL Cybersecurity Assurance Program Certification.

catalysts.event: Entered purchase agreement to divest controlling interest in IV Solutions business
catalysts.sentence: In November 2024, we entered into a purchase agreement (the "Agreement") with Otsuka Pharmaceutical Factory America, Inc. ( OPF ), a global IV solutions manufacturing subsidiary of Otsuka Holdings Co., Ltd., to divest a controlling interest in our IV Solutions business.

catalysts.event: Formation of joint venture and transfer of IV Solutions assets
catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, pursuant to the Agreement, ICU Medical Pearl LLC (n/k/a Otsuka ICU Medical LLC (the "joint venture")) was formed, and the assets, liabilities and operations comprising the IV Solutions product line were transferred to the joint venture.

catalysts.event: Closed sale of 60% interest in joint venture
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, upon the closing under the Agreement, we sold a 60% ownership interest in the joint venture to OPF and the Company retained a 40% ownership interest in the business.

catalysts.event: Received FDA 510(k) clearance for Plum precision pumps
catalysts.sentence: The Plum precision pumps are designed to deliver compatible intravenous medications through a single or dual channel, with the dual channel configuration capable of delivering up to four compatible medications through a single pump. ... received FDA 510(k) clearance in April 2025.

catalysts.event: Filed 510(k) application for refreshed CADD infusion pump
catalysts.sentence: The Company has filed a 510(k) application for new clearance for a refreshed CADD infusion pump in July 2025.

catalysts.event: Filed 510(k) application for next generation MedFusion infusion pump
catalysts.sentence: The Company has filed a 510(k) application for new clearances for the next generation MedFusion infusion pump in July 2025.

catalysts.event: U.S. tariff increase announced for certain countries including Costa Rica
catalysts.sentence: On July 31, 2025, the U.S. announced that the 10% baseline reciprocal tariff on imports from all countries would be raised to 15% for certain countries, including Costa Rica.

catalysts.event: U.S. initiated national security investigation into imports of medical consumables and equipment
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, the U.S. Commerce Department (the "Department") initiated a national security investigation into imports of medical consumables and equipment under Section 232 of the Trade Expansion Act.
